channel.title: Dolls & Accessories on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO Friends Beach Smoothie Stand Kids’ Pretend Play Food Set Gift Idea for Girls and Boys Aged 6 and over with 2 Mini-Dolls a Turtle Figure and Accessories 42625
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Friends Beach Smoothie Stand Kids’ Pretend Play Food Set Gift Idea for Girls and Boys Aged 6 and over with 2 Mini-Dolls a Turtle Figure and Accessories 42625 here: ℹ️: 2 LEGO Friends characters – This set comes with a turtle figure, plus a Niko mini-doll and a Nova LEGO Friends mini-doll with an extra face Create the beach scene – As well as a buildable smoothie stand, this set comes with a buildable beach buggy, a swing, a cooler and a signpost Lots of accessories – Includes strawberry, banana, blueberry, orange, yoghurt and peanut butter smoothie ingredients, plus glasses and much more Play food set – This LEGO Friends Beach Smoothie Stand role-play toy for 6-plus-year-old girls and boys includes 2 mini-dolls and a turtle figure Mix up smoothie combinations – Imaginative play is lots of fun with this LEGO Friends set as kids choose ingredients and place them in the blender A gift idea for kids – This LEGO Friends set makes a fun gift idea for 6-plus-year-old girls, boys and kids who love food toys and friendship stories 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Gabby s Dollhouse Toy Playset 4-Floor & 8-Room Dollhouse with Gabby Pandy Paws MerCat and Cakey figures plus Accessories Gift Toys for 4 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids 10788
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Gabby s Dollhouse Toy Playset 4-Floor & 8-Room Dollhouse with Gabby Pandy Paws MerCat and Cakey figures plus Accessories Gift Toys for 4 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids 10788 at the following link: ℹ️: Gabbys Dollhouse toys for girls and boys let kids aged 4+ join in the fun with Gabby minifigure, plus Pandy Paws, MerCat and Cakey figures Includes Gabbys Dollhouse accessories: a cupcake, scissors, paint brush, hairbrush, shampoo bottle, flower, microphone, guitar and much more With a Starter Brick and simple picture building steps, building this cat-shaped dollhouse is fast and fun, helping kids to develop key skills Kids can bake in the kitchen, use a slide in the playroom or get creative in one of 8 activity-filled rooms connected by a cat-a-vator lift LEGO Gabbys Dollhouse toys for girls, boys and kids aged 4+ introduce to creative building and make a fun birthday gift or Christmas present idea Kids can play piano in the Gabbys Dollhouse music room, take a nap in the bedroom or party on the rooftops rotatable dance floor Treat DreamWorks Animation TV shows fans to a 4-floor, 8-room Gabbys Dollhouse toy with this LEGO playset with 4 characters and accessories 🛒 Check the deal!
